name: luxstay-merged-premium
description: Merged luxury hotel booking project - React Tailwind frontend + Express backend

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix backend --no-audit --no-fund && npm install --prefix frontend --no-audit --no-fund
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend --no-audit --no-fund && npm install --prefix frontend --no-audit --no-fund
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c green,cyan "npm start --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
